name: Chocolate Things
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chocolate morsels in a heat-safe bowl.
2. Set up a double boiler with water in the bottom pot and the bowl of chocolate on top.
3. Heat gently, stirring until the chocolate is completely melted.
4. Remove from heat and add the peanut butter.
5. Stir well to combine.
6. Pour the mixture onto wax paper.
7. Allow to cool and harden completely.
busted by sooz
